message:
test(widgets): add 9 unit tests for voi_debug_overlay.rs (bd-hd599)

Cover VoiOverlayStyle defaults, header formatting with/without tick
and source, SKIP verdict, observation-only mode, ledger skip entry,
posterior values, with_style builder, and Debug impl coverage.
13 total tests (4 existing + 9 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
